activities.description: With Jay and Liza

activities.name: While the car was being serviced
Mt Si Old Trail
activities.description: With Jay and Liza

activities.name: 3 Tigers Long Loop
activities.description: Up West Tiger 1, then down to the Tiger Mountain Road at the Hikers Hut, and follow it up to West Tiger 2, then back to West Tiger 3 and down.

activities.name: Two Phinneys Anti-Clockwise
activities.description: My usual 4 mile loop including 2 climbs of Phinney Ridge

activities.name: Hills of Lake Union
activities.description: My standard Long Run when I'm not on a trail.

activities.name: Queen Anne Street Scramble
activities.description: Peter Gaylord and I did the Queen Anne Street Sramble. Lots of running, navigating, strategizing and stairs in this 90 minute event.

activities.name: Kenwood Hill Intervals + grocery run
activities.description: 3x the Kenwood hill, then a side trip to the Wallingford QFC returning with breakfast goods!

activities.name: Tiger Summit Road
activities.description: Out and back on the Tiger Summit dirt road. Turned around after 5 miles

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: This strange braid used to be my most common run. Perhaps it will be again.

activities.name: Two Phinneys Anti Clockwise
activities.description: Ate too many Swedish fish last night.

activities.name: "Afraid of the Water" hilly 10K
activities.description: I made this course up today and like it. Will do it again.

activities.name: Fremont Safari
activities.description: First time in a while I've run this loop. Paused a few times on the way up Wallingford. Need to do it without stopping next time.

activities.name: Phinney Fremont Clockwise
activities.description: Stopped at traffic lights and a few other places. Goal is to do it this fast with approx. 0 stops.

activities.name: Two Phinneys Anti-Clockwise
activities.description: Thought I'd be slow, but fastest recent time.

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: Not sure whether to be alarmed or proud of the suffer score here. I think I need to do some research.

activities.name: Two Phinneys Clockwise
activities.description: Pretty good, especially since I was a tad hung over from too good an evening last night.

activities.name: Green Lake Outer Path
activities.description: Oh how I hate the flats

activities.name: Neighborhood Improv
activities.description: Feeling a bit meh this morning. Don't think heart rate monitor was working.

activities.name: Two Phinneys Anti-clockwise
activities.description: First new shoes in at least 2000 miles. I was a little overdue.

activities.name: Hills of Lake Union
activities.description: I like these shoes!

activities.name: Mt Tenerife Logging Road
activities.description: this one is relentless. Lucky I didn't go all the way to the top... As it was I just returned in time to prevent the sherrif from towing my only-slightly-illegally parked car.

activities.name: Dog Walk to Woodland Park
activities.description: Lots of sniffing as usual, and a good amount of ball chasing

activities.name: Ad hoc Recovery Trot
activities.description: Including some quarter miles at 7, 6:30, and 6:15 pace.

activities.name: Hmmm
activities.description: Not feeling so great this morning

activities.name: Two Phineys Anti Clockwise
activities.description: Feeling better, but still a bit weak. Heart rate monitor not working

activities.name: 1 loop of Woodland Park
activities.description: Feeling weak

activities.name: Two Phinneys Clockwise
activities.description: I've been weak for a week. Not sure why.

activities.name: Green Lake Outer Path
activities.description: Trying for 8 minute pace, but paused a few times

activities.name: Two Phinneys Anti Clockwise
activities.description: That feels better

activities.name: 2PCW
activities.description: With any luck, the next trail I upload should be from a very different part of the world

activities.name: Across the Golden Horn
activities.description: and to the Galata Tower

activities.name: Around the Topkapi Palace
activities.description: with Steve Trautman

activities.name: Stymied on Symi
activities.description: Steve Trautman and I were trying to get up to the road across the island. Good thing we didn't make it, given how hot it got.

activities.name: Greek Gods of Delos
activities.description: A walk/swim with Steve Trautman on his birthday. The Aegean is so beautifully clear. Must work out how to upload a photo to this site...

activities.name: 2PAC
activities.description: Feels good to be home running in the cool

activities.name: Approach to Mt Shasta
activities.description: Climb from Bunny Flat to Helen Lake, with pack

activities.name: Mt Shasta Summit Plateau
activities.description: From Helen Lake to Summit plateau, then back to the car

activities.name: Phinney Fremont 5 miler
activities.description: Hot this morning. Lots of stops

activities.name: 750' Treadmill
activities.description: Back on the gym treadmill. Goal is to get back to the 1000 vertical foot run in less than 40 mins. Good start today

activities.name: 4x Kenwood Hill Intervals
activities.description: Fastest climb: 2:29

activities.name: 1000' vertical run
activities.description: Fan assisted!

activities.name: Putrid Pete and Mason Lake Loop
activities.description: Found this route while browsing Strava. The climb up Putrid Pete's peak is definitely a scramble near the top, and the ridge traverse is also a bit ad hoc. However -- it's a SPECTACULAR loop, and if you start really early as we did, the killer southern slope isn't in the sunshine. Thanks to Steve Trautman for joining me and encouraging me.

activities.name: Woodland leg-stretcher
activities.description: Recovery run/walk on tired legs

activities.name: 1000' vertical run
activities.description: 2 pauses, fan assisted.

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: Happy with the pace, but goal is to get to the 8:00 mark before the rain comes.

activities.name: Ravenna and the Burke Gilman
activities.description: I decided to explore new territory this morning. It was fun.

activities.name: Cut down 2PAC
activities.description: Low energy after long run + workout with the Trautmans yesterday. Walked up the hills

activities.name: 1000' vertical at 15% grade
activities.description: Starting at 3 mph, then cranking it by .1 every 100 vertical feet

activities.name: 1000' vertical run
activities.description: Total of 6 minutes of rest during this one.

activities.name: West Tiger Loop
activities.description: Beautiful morning. The vegetation loved last week's rain

activities.name: Two hiked up; one flew down
activities.description: Great hike with Morgan Venable to the Poo Poo paraglider launch point. Morgan got a ride down, and I ran back.

activities.name: 2PAC
activities.description: Beautiful morning! Run included an unauthorized stop on Phinney on the way home

activities.name: Phinney fremont Anti Clockwise
activities.description: Felt pretty good. 5 min break at bottom of Wallingford

activities.name: Disovery Park Loop
activities.description: Only one lap today, but good pace.

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: Nice progress towards my goal of doing run this in 8:00/mile again as I did once last year.

activities.name: 2PCW
activities.description: Slower first half, but seemed to make it up a bit.

activities.name: Aborted Tangletown 4-miler
activities.description: Getting a cough-cold

activities.name: Green Lake
activities.description: First run in a week after a head and chest cold. Still coughing a bit, so taking it easy.

activities.name: Phinney Fremont Loop clockwise
activities.description: Hopefully this is the beginning of getting back from my cold of the last 10 days.

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: I'm slowing down not speeding up. This must change!

activities.name: Phinney-Fremont Loop Anticlockwise
activities.description: Sluggish with a few stops. Not great.

activities.name: Gothic Basin. What the Fog?
activities.description: A nice moist hike with my friend Peter up one of the worst trails in the Cascades. We were going to scramble Gothic Peak, but the fog was thick and the rains were coming. A fun day though. A few photos: http://gedye.smugmug.com/2014/Gothic-Basin/

activities.name: Fremont Phinney Clockwise
activities.description: Good time, but 2 stops

activities.name: Sore legs & Insect Inhalation
activities.description: What a lovely day

activities.name: 2PAC
activities.description: More pausing than strictly legit, but not bad. Changed the route a little back through woodland park

activities.name: Agnes Gorge Hike
activities.description: With Peter, Kevin, and Chris

activities.name: 1st part of McGregor Mountain
activities.description: With Peter Gaylord and Chris Coward

activities.name: Coon Lake to McGregor Scramble, back to Ranch
activities.description: with Peter Gaylord at Chris Coward. We started another 600' down, so the real elevation is 6000, and the real distance is close enough to 16 miles.

activities.name: 4 miles, 1000' Treadmill
activities.description: First time back on the treadmill in a long time. 3 minutes of rest in there.

activities.name: Hike Towards Twin lakes w/ Chris and Baloo
Treadmill 4 miler, cut short.
activities.description: Low energy. Upper respiratory track feeling constricted.

activities.name: 4 miles, 1000' treadmill
activities.description: Given how little I've been doing the last few weeks, this wasn't bad. Two pauses, totaling 3 mins.

activities.name: Walk in Arastedero Open Space with Mark Shand
Green Lake Outer Loop
activities.description: Tried to maintain 8:30, but couldn't! Next time try 8:40

activities.name: 750 vertical feet
activities.description: 6% on treadmill. Starting at 5.5mph, going to 6.1

activities.name: Circuit of West Tiger
activities.description: With iron-man Trautman and "Tennis is my only exercise" Jamrozik (who can run up anything). Hopefully the first of many adventures.

activities.name: 1500' hike up
activities.description: 15% at about 3.1 mph, watching Seahawks

activities.name: 8x100 vertical intervals at 10%
activities.description: Started at 5 mph; ended at 5.5. 60s recovery between reps

activities.name: TPAC
activities.description: Two Phinneys Anti Clockwise. Definitely slower than I used to be. Not sure what's up.

activities.name: 101 at Kalaloch
activities.description: I can recommend the bluff cabins at kalaloch. Should have gone up that logging road further than I did.

activities.name: 6x100' vert intervals + 400 vert hike
activities.description: tried to do 10x100' at 6mph. Couldn't make it. Hiked the rest.

activities.name: 1000' vertical run
activities.description: no fans. too hot. 4 mins of break.

activities.name: Truncated Home 4-miler
activities.description: Not feeling too great

activities.name: Hills of Lake Union
activities.description: I plodded behind Tri-Trautman and jack-rabbit Jamrozik. Very fun though

activities.name: 1000' vertical at 4.75%
activities.description: Well below target pace, but just the day after an 11 mile run, so relax. Glad to finish it.

activities.name: Phinney-Fremont Anti-clockwise
activities.description: A fraction shorter than previous versions as I didn't stay at Lake Union level all th way to Gas Works

activities.name: Locks to wallingford via downtown
activities.description: Joined Steve and Herve half way into their big 18 miler

activities.name: Rowing machine: 5x500m intervals
activities.description: Changing it up a little at the gym. Tried to do each interval in 2 mins, failed by an average of 3s.

activities.name: 1000' vertical
activities.description: Not bad. 3.5 minutes of rest along the way

activities.name: John Wayne Trail from Mt Washington
activities.description: Exploring this great railway-trail for the first time, amazingly. I have ambitions to do much more of it in the future. Thank you Herve for coming with me. Elevation gain was really only 500'. The number reported here includes all the valleys that the trestles span.

activities.name: 1000' vertical
activities.description: Was going slow to see if I could make it to 1500' at the 10 min-mile pace, but got too hot

activities.name: Electric guitar-shaped run
activities.description: Alternative name: Lake union on a stick

activities.name: Half a Run
activities.description: half a run is better than no run.

activities.name: 10x100' vertical intervals
activities.description: Used to be able to do these at 10% and 6mph. This was a little slower

activities.name: 1000' vertical
activities.description: The usual, with 3 minutes of break at the 4.5,5.0% incline

activities.name: Row + Hike
activities.description: 3000m on the erg, followed by 500' of elevation on the treadmill at 15%

activities.name: Mailbox Peak via new trail
activities.description: Very cold day, but great "butter" trail, with Peter, Laruen, and Jay

activities.name: Phinney Fremont Anti clockwise
activities.description: Went a little further than the house to achieve 5 miles

activities.name: 500' climb + 500m row
activities.description: Motivation a bit of a problem for some reason....

activities.name: Broken Guitar
activities.description: Wasn't feeling up to completing the "electric guitar" run with Steve, Herve, and Tamara. They did all 10 miles.

activities.name: John Wayne Trail with Mino and Steve
activities.description: In the driving rain! The elevation gain is way off. More like 500'

activities.name: Phinney/Fremony - Clockwise
activities.description: Tired legs after Friday's exertion. 24 degrees outside!

activities.name: Gym Workout
activities.description: Arms, core, lunges, balance. 1000m on erg.

activities.name: Medina for lunch
activities.description: Haven't run here for years. Very pleasant on a sunny cold day. Nice variety of hills.

activities.name: 1000' vertical
activities.description: Just 900' running. Got too hot. The other 100' was hiking.

activities.name: Clyde Hill with cars
activities.description: Good, but too much traffic on 84th Ave late in dark of a fall afternoon. next time different route.

activities.name: Discovery Park Loop x 2
activities.description: With Jason Palmer for the first lap. Looking forward to more running dates in the future. Took a break in the middle of the 2nd lap. Beautiful fog over Bainbridge

activities.name: Vertical intervals
activities.description: 1000' in 80' intervals of 10 mph at 10% grade, with 1 minute breaks.

activities.name: 1000 vertical feet
activities.description: Treadmill. Kept speed at 10 min/mile in hopes of being able to last longer. Took one 2 min break.

activities.name: 21 miler down the John Wayne Trail
activities.description: With Herve Jamrozik. BEST RUN EVER. For some reason Strava didn't include the first 2.3 miles in the tunnel. Starting point was Hyak tunnel entrance.

activities.name: Circuit of Gym Activities
activities.description: Pullups, lunges, squats, 2x500m rowing, 2x70' vertical treadmill intervals. Call it the equivalent of a 2-mile run.

activities.name: 1000 vertical
activities.description: As usual, limited by overheating. Total of 4 minutes break.

activities.name: Medina for Lunch
activities.description: 2 stops on the way back

activities.name: 1/2 a run
activities.description: Stomach not feeling too great

activities.name: Green Lake Inner track clockwise
activities.description: No stops!

activities.name: Sighseeing in Sacremento
activities.description: Head/chest cold coming on. Route is in mapmyrun.com
